---
title: Nature
categories:
  - college
  - course
  - jupyterlab
  - quarto 
  - r
  - rstudio 
  - shiny 
  - vscode 
---

nature.datahub.berkeley.edu is a hub for courses within the [College of Natural Resources](https://nature.berkeley.edu). The [user environment](https://github.com/berkeley-dsep-infra/nature-user-image) is based on repo2docker and contains a Jupyter stack, RStudio, Shiny, and VS Code.
